text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, provides essential nutrients for your body. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling for 30 minutes most days, strengthens your heart and muscles. Equally important is getting enough sleep, around seven to nine hours each night, which helps your body recover and improves concentration. Mental health also plays a crucial role; taking time to relax, practicing mindfulness, or talking to friends can reduce stress. Finally, achieving a good work-life balance ensures you have time for hobbies and rest, preventing burnout and keeping you happy and productive.
